name: pantheon-design-system
description: Petpooja's Pantheon design system as a Claude plugin. Applies Pantheon tokens, Prometheus typography, and the 47-component library to every visual or branded output. Includes /sync-pantheon (evidence-only Figma re-digest — every patched value cites a literal MCP source), /pantheon-bootstrap (one-time teammate setup with explicit Figma auth confirmation), a UserPromptSubmit hook that auto-triggers weekly re-syncs, and a macOS LaunchAgent installer for terminal users.
